creator: language.devel@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #3)

Neel, thanks for working on this. The automated build is failing at fetch. Please grab apache-cassandra-3.11.10-repo.tar.gz from the link in comment #0, upload to LOCAL, and modify MASTER_SITES as necessary.

For discussion on why this is necessary (if you're not already familiar with the difficulties of maven-based ports on FreeBSD) you can check out this mailing list thread: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2016-June/103442.html
